emberlands.name: Emberlands
emberlands.summary: Ash plains and slow lava seams under a burning haze. The ground itself smoulders.

rimeshelf.name: Rimeshelf
rimeshelf.summary: Fractured ice shelves over frozen meltwater — bright, flat, and offering no cover.

stormflats.name: Stormflats
stormflats.summary: Open salt flats beneath a standing thunderhead, cut by fulgurite spines.

arcane-hollow.name: Arcane Hollow
arcane-hollow.summary: Sunken basins of mirrored stone where the light seems to arrive a moment late.

stonereach.name: Stonereach
stonereach.summary: Terraced bedrock and boulder fields — the most defensible ground in the world.
